items.name: James Hargreaves
items.text: Log-It have been servicing my regulators for years. Exceptional attention to detail — always explained what was done and why. My equipment always comes back performing like new.

items.name: Sarah Mitchell
items.text: Had both my cylinders PIAT tested and they turned around faster than expected. The video documentation of the inspection gave me total peace of mind. Highly recommended.

items.name: Mark Thompson
items.text: Sent my BCD and regs in by post — seamlessly easy process, and the service report was thorough. Great communication throughout.
